base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of luigi_all_animations_palette_swap — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Full mirror of Mario's animation set rendered with Luigi's green/white/brown palette — small/big/fire forms × idle/walk/jump/skid/swim/climb/die/throw-fireball/grow-shrink/glitch. Not separately enumerated per animation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Full mirror of Mario's animation set rendered with Luigi's green/white/brown palette — small/big/fire forms × idle/walk/jump/skid/swim/climb/die/throw-fireball/grow-shrink/glitch. Not separately enumerated per animation; each mirrors its Mario counterpart
